author: nc1234
content:
<@&1416139337179074590> I don't know exactly who to ping but I am having a great time exploring xatu data with `panda`. It looks like some of the CBT tables on hoodi are not updating. I let AI summarize this:
```
Raw/gossip-derived tables are fine (fct_attestation_first_seen_chunked_50ms, fct_attestation_observation_by_node, fct_block_first_seen_by_node all current), so raw ingestion looks healthy — this looks like CBT transformation jobs stopped. Three clusters by last-data date (checked via max(slot/hour_start_date_time) per table):

Frozen since 2026-06-24 (18 tables — everything that depends on canonical-chain processing: correctness, duties, reorgs):
fct_attestation_correctness{,_canonical,_by_validator,_by_validator_canonical}, fct_attestation_first_seen_by_validator, fct_attestation_vote_correctness_by_validator{,_hourly}, fct_attestation_inclusion_delay_hourly, fct_attestation_liveness_by_entity, fct_attestation_participation_rate_hourly, fct_block_proposer{,_by_validator}, fct_block_proposal_status_hourly, fct_head_vote_correctness_rate_hourly, fct_missed_slot_rate_hourly, fct_reorg_hourly, fct_sync_committee_participation_by_validator{,_hourly}

Frozen since 2026-06-26 (13 tables — all EL/state: fct_execution_{gas_limit,gas_used,tps,transactions,receipt_size}_hourly, fct_contract_storage_*, fct_storage_slot_state_by_*, fct_opcode_*)

Older strays: fct_validator_balance{,_hourly} dead since 2026-04-13; fct_block_blob_first_seen_by_node since 2025-10-28; fct_storage_slot_state_with_expiry_* since 2025-10-29; fct_execution_state_size_hourly empty.
```
mainnet data is perfectly fine though. Is this something you guys are aware of?
